title: multiconnect-via-translator
description: This project hosts the ViaVersion translator for multiconnect. It is downloaded automatically by multiconnect; it's not meant to be downloaded manually.
body: ViaVersion implementation of the multiconnect translator. You should not use this mod directly if you don't know what you're doing. Instead, download [multiconnect](https://modrinth.com/mod/multiconnect). Multiconnect will download this mod automatically by default.
